what_it_does: This file is a metadata record that declares a channel attachment of type board_items, linking a dragnet-development channel item to board item item-4c4fd26d and recording when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
Fields: id, channel, attachment_type, target, added
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-4c4fd26d
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
conventions: Follows a YAML frontmatter metadata schema for channel attachments
Uses a board:// URI scheme for cross-resource target references
Uses an ISO 8601 timestamp for the added field
concerns: No payload or descriptive content beyond metadata
The board:// target cannot be resolved from this file alone
notes: A minimal channel attachment stub that records a link to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or message is being attached?
What is the title or nature of board item item-4c4fd26d?
Who added this attachment and why?
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to establish and timestamp a formal attachment relationship between a channel artifact and a specific board item.
novelty: Uses a board:// URI scheme to reference a board item target.
contribution: Contributes a precise, timestamped attachment linkage between a channel and a board item, useful for reconstructing cross-resource references in a fused ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML metadata file declaring a board_items attachment in the dragnet-development channel targeting board item item-4c4fd26d with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a channel artifact is attached to a specific board item at a known time.
